required_traits: chunky readable mining RPG item silhouettes
hammered metal and worn leather material language
warm mine lighting baked into item surfaces only
forbidden_mixes: visible chroma-key fringe in final runtime crops

assets.intended_role: Mine Cards isolated equipment sprite source sheet for future inventory/equipment and mining upgrade UI
assets.observed_subject: Twelve isolated fantasy-mining equipment items in a 3x4 sheet: worn pickaxe, copper pickaxe, mining helmet, miner armor, plain ring, ruby ring, skull relic scroll, skull/mine charm pendant, hand axe, battle axe, spiked mace, and dark crown.
problems: accepted as draft source for slicing, not final-art completion
raw generated candidate B failed intake; this accepted sheet is a deterministic resheet from the generated source
green fringe was scrubbed for source intake, but final runtime crops still need generated UI pixel audit and edge proof before integration

the mine charm is skull-themed rather than a neutral mining charm; acceptable for the current dark Mine Cards equipment mood but should be revisited if the equipment UI needs friendlier mining-only trinkets
